args:
python3 <<'PY'
import ctypes,ctypes.util,struct,sys
MAX=256
class C(ctypes.Structure): pass
lib=ctypes.CDLL(ctypes.util.find_library('crypto') or 'libcrypto.so.1.1')
lib.EVP_CIPHER_CTX_new.restype=ctypes.POINTER(C)
lib.EVP_aes_256_gcm.restype=ctypes.c_void_p
lib.EVP_CIPHER_CTX_ctrl.argtypes=[ctypes.POINTER(C),ctypes.c_int,ctypes.c_int,ctypes.c_void_p]
def dec(key,iv,aad,ct,tag):
 ctx=lib.EVP_CIPHER_CTX_new()
 lib.EVP_DecryptInit_ex(ctx,lib.EVP_aes_256_gcm(),None,ctypes.create_string_buffer(key),ctypes.create_string_buffer(iv))
 ol=ctypes.c_int(0)
 if aad: lib.EVP_DecryptUpdate(ctx,None,ctypes.byref(ol),ctypes.create_string_buffer(aad),len(aad))
 out=ctypes.create_string_buffer(len(ct)+16); ol=ctypes.c_int(0)
 if ct: lib.EVP_DecryptUpdate(ctx,out,ctypes.byref(ol),ctypes.create_string_buffer(ct),len(ct))
 t=ol.value; lib.EVP_CIPHER_CTX_ctrl(ctx,0x11,len(tag),ctypes.create_string_buffer(tag))
 fl=ctypes.c_int(0); lib.EVP_DecryptFinal_ex(ctx,out,ctypes.byref(fl)); lib.EVP_CIPHER_CTX_free(ctx); return out.raw[:t+fl.value]
d=open('enc.db','rb').read(); o=4; u={}
for _ in range(struct.unpack_from('<i',d,0)[0]):
 name=d[o:o+MAX].split(b'\0')[0]; o+=MAX+16; u[name]=d[o:o+32]; o+=32
o=4+struct.unpack_from('<i',d,0)[0]*(MAX+48)+4
while o<len(d):
 name=d[o:o+MAX].split(b'\0')[0]; o+=MAX
 fn=d[o:o+MAX].split(b'\0')[0]; o+=MAX
 iv=d[o:o+16]; o+=16
 tg=d[o:o+16]; o+=16
 el=struct.unpack_from('<i',d,o)[0]; o+=4
 ct=d[o:o+el]; o+=el
 if name==b'user2' and fn==b'file2':
  sys.stdout.write(dec(u[name],iv[:12],name+fn,ct,tg).decode()); break
PY
